prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类社会热度高热推荐，电气工程及其自动化高热推荐，计算机类推荐，数据科学与大数据技术、人工智能等专业热度上升；生化环材类（化学、生物技术等）明显劝退。江西省2026年高考总人数约474900人，物理类考生估算约26.8万人，较2025年26.6万人略有增加；辽宁大学位于辽宁省，在江西省为跨省招生，2026年理科计划49人，招生规模适中；东北地区高校在江西考生中的地域偏好一般，无明显加分或减分效应。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were 19,210, 19,292, 19,190, 20,505, and 25,726 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, they were basically stable around 19,200, then shifted to 20,500 in 2024, and significantly shifted to 25,726 in 2025 (a shift of 5,221 places compared to 2024), with large fluctuations. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 25,726. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Jiangxi was 22 in 2021, 23 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 23 in 2024, and 42 in 2025 (significant expansion). The 2026 plan is 49, an increase of 7 (+16.7%) compared to 2025. Two consecutive years of significant expansion have a notable driving effect on the ranking shift.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Liaoning University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 125th, with recent rankings stable in the 124–131 range, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. Its comprehensive strength has a certain influence in the Northeast region. The university's Douyin popularity ranking is 105th, with a rating of 'average' and relatively low overall popularity. The reputation file shows no negative public opinion about Liaoning University, no record of enrollment gaps, and overall reputation is stable, with no significant negative impact on applications. Applied Economics (A-) is the only A- or above discipline at Liaoning University, corresponding to majors such as Economics, Finance, Public Finance, and Economic Statistics in the science enrollment. New engineering majors like Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology, and Artificial Intelligence, although not directly supported by discipline evaluations, align with current industry demands.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly recommended with high social popularity, Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended, Computer majors are recommended, and majors like Data Science and Big Data Technology and Artificial Intelligence are rising in popularity. Majors in Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials (e.g., Chemistry, Biotechnology) are clearly discouraged. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Gaokao is approximately 474,900, with an estimated 268,000 physics category candidates, a slight increase from 266,000 in 2025. Liaoning University is located in Liaoning Province and recruits across provinces in Jiangxi. In 2026, the science plan is 49, a moderate enrollment size. The regional preference for Northeast universities among Jiangxi candidates is average, with no obvious positive or negative effects.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking trend (a significant shift of 5,221 places in 2025), the 16.7% expansion in 2026, a slight increase in the total number of physics category candidates, and a downward trend in the provincial control line reflecting eased competition, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for science in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 25,726, but the shift magnitude will be significantly narrower than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 28,319, with a range of 27,819–28,819.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 27,819–28,819, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Economics, Public Finance, Finance, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Microelectronics, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, Digital Economy) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Biotechnology, Pharmaceutical Engineering, Business Administration, etc.) as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<27,819), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 new engineering majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>28,819), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 safety options and avoid discouraged majors in Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were 2326, 3279, 3488, 3528, and 5109 respectively, showing a continuous backward trend. Especially in 2025, it shifted back by about 1581 places compared to 2024, with significantly increased fluctuation. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 5109. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangxi Province for liberal arts (history category) was 19 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 20 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 40 in 2025 (significant expansion). The 2026 plan is 42, an increase of 2 (+5%) compared to 2025. Two consecutive years of expansion have somewhat alleviated competition pressure, but the expansion is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Liaoning University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 125th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 124 and 131, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 institutions with stable overall strength. On the Douyin platform, its popularity ranking is 105th, with a rating of 'average' and relatively low overall popularity. In the 2026 reputation documents, no negative public opinion incidents involving Liaoning University were found, and there have been no records of enrollment gaps or sharp drops in recent years. Overall reputation is stable, with no significant negative impact on applications. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Liaoning University's Applied Economics was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline, directly corresponding to majors such as Economics, Finance, and Public Finance in the enrollment, providing some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among liberal arts enrollment majors, Law and Accounting are socially popular/recommended; Chinese Language and Literature, Philosophy, etc., have stable popularity; Journalism and Communication majors are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of Jiangxi Province college entrance exam takers is about 474,900, a slight increase (+0.5%) from 472,480 in 2025. History category candidates are estimated at about 207,000, with a basically stable competition base. Liaoning University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning Province, in the Northeast region, and recruits across provinces in Jiangxi. In 2026, the liberal arts plan is 42, accounting for a small portion of the university's total enrollment in Jiangxi, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings (especially the significant shift in 2025), the small 5% expansion in 2026, the slight increase in Jiangxi Province candidate numbers, and the upward trend in provincial control lines reflecting intensified competition in the history category, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for liberal arts in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 5109. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5277, with a range of 4777 to 5777.
